name: Alimak Group AB (publ)
summary: Alimak Group AB (publ) provides vertical access solutions in Europe, Asia, Australia, South and North America, and internationally. The company operates through four segments: Construction Equipment, Industrial Equipment, After Sales, and Rental. It designs, develops, manufactures, sells, and rents rack-and-pinion operated construction hoists for passengers and materials, and transport platforms and material elevators for vertical transportation of people and material, as well as mobile work platforms; and designs, develops, manufactures and distributes industrial equipment, such as elevators, platforms, and maintenance units for permanent use in a range of industries, including buildings and infrastructure, ports and shipyards, oil and gas, wind, and power and cement, as well as offers building maintenance systems. The company also provides after sales services, including installation, technical support, maintenance, repairs, refurbishment, training, inspections. and spare parts. The company offers its products and services under the Alimak, Avanti, CoxGomyl, Manntech, and Alimak Service brand names. Alimak Group AB (publ) was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
